name: No witnesses to my neck slip at work in Murray, can I still get comp?
description: Yes, medical proof and your account enough.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my neck slip at work in Murray, can I still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical proof and your account enough.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, your testimony plus medical evidence and circumstances suffice.** No witnesses not fatal.[3] Key factors: Incident report; video if any; consistent doctor history. Builds via records. Many solo claims succeed.
